Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on API information

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} viewed information about objects "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is viewing information about objects "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to view information about objects "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is changing object "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is creating object "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create object "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is deleting objects "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change object "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete objects "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
